description_long: This is a rectangular loaf of white bread with a soft, airy interior and a golden-brown crust. The loaf is visibly sliced, with several even cuts running vertically along its length, revealing the fluffy, porous crumb inside. The crust is smooth and slightly glossy, with gentle ridges and a few minor creases, typical of sandwich bread. The sides of the loaf show the separation between slices, with the crust wrapping around the top and sides. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or branding on the surface. The bread appears fresh and ready for consumption, commonly found in urban environments such as bakeries, grocery stores, or on picnic tables.
description: A rectangular loaf of sliced white bread with a golden-brown crust and a soft, airy interior. The loaf is evenly sliced and has a smooth, slightly glossy crust.
description_view_0: Front view showing the soft, white interior of the bread and the even, vertical slices.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the golden-brown crust and the visible separation between the slices.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the soft crumb and the crust wrapping around the edges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the crust and the clear definition of the slices.
materials: bread (wheat flour, water, yeast, salt, oil)
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is smooth and golden-brown with gentle ridges and minor creases, typical of sandwich bread. There are no seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring visible.
